usecase.description: The clock radio wakes the user at the configured alarm time.
usecase.pre-condition: The current time is available, alarm settings are configured, and the clock radio is powered.
usecase.main-event: The user enables the alarm and sets an alarm time.
The user selects the radio operating mode and optionally sets radio frequency and volume.
The clock maintains the current timestamp.
When the current time matches the configured alarm time in automatic mode, the alarm manager triggers the alarm.
The radio broadcasts audio output to the user.
usecase.post-condition: The user is alerted by the clock radio at the requested time.
usecase.alternate-event: If the alarm is disabled, the radio mode is not automatic, the alarm time is not reached, or radio audio is unavailable, the user is not woken by radio playback.

usecase.description: The user sets or reads the current time from the clock radio.
usecase.pre-condition: The clock radio is powered and the display function is available.
usecase.main-event: The user sets the current time.
The clock function updates the internal timestamp.
The display function presents the timestamp to the user.
usecase.post-condition: The clock radio shows the current time to the user.
usecase.alternate-event: If the current time is not set, the displayed time may be incorrect.

usecase.description: The user configures the radio and listens to received radio audio.
usecase.pre-condition: The radio transmitter emits radio waves and the clock radio is powered.
usecase.main-event: The user sets radio mode, frequency, and volume.
The radio subsystem receives and decodes radio waves.
The radio subsystem broadcasts radio sound to the user.
usecase.post-condition: The user hears radio audio at the configured settings.
usecase.alternate-event: If no usable radio signal is received, radio sound is unavailable to the user.
